sections.paragraph:
σαβαχθάνι (also σαβαχθανεί; Aram. שְׁבַקְתַּנִי instead of the Hebr. עֲזַבְתָּנִי Ps 22:2; fr. שְׁבַק) you have forsaken me Mt 27:46; Mk 15:34.—EKautzsch, Gramm. des Bibl.-Aram. 1884, 11; Dalman, Gramm.2 147 note 4; 156; 221, Jesus 1922, 185f [Engl. tr. 204f]; DSidersky, RHR 103, ’31, 151–54. On the accent s. Wlh. on Mk 15:34.

  1. fr. = from

Dalman Dalman = GD., various works—List 6

Engl. Engl. = English

  1. tr. = translate, etc.

RHR RHR = Revue de l’histoire des religions—List 6

Wlh. Wlh. = JWellhausen, Einleitung—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 909
